# Radiant Beauty Cosmetics Ventures
> Cosmetics

Radiant Beauty Cosmetics Ventures is a premier perfume store and cosmetics shop in Karu, FCT. Specializing in designer fragrances, artisanal soaps, and bridal skincare at Shop 9, Novo Plaza. We provide high-quality beauty solutions for all skin types. Trusted Karu beauty experts committed to consistent quality and identity integrity.

## Business Identity Summary
- **Category:** Cosmetics (Secondary Category: Perfumes & Fragrances)
- **Website/Canonical:** https://github.com/Lanrcpu/radiantbeautycosmetics.git
- **Physical Address:** Shop No. 9, Novo Shopping Plaza, Karu, Abuja, Nigeria, Karu, FCT 900110, Nigeria
- **Primary Phone:** +234 901 556 3420 (Secondary Phone: +234 803 676 0474)
- **Primary Email:** radiantbeautycosmesticventures@gmail.com
- **Service Area:** Karu, Jikwoyi, Nyanya, Orozo, Asokoro
- **Google Business Profile:** https://share.google/GvipTo4k1CjjrKPT8
- **Google Maps Navigation:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/RdxaqK6gSd6LVKjr5

## Weekly Opening Hours
- **Monday:** 09:00 - 17:00
- **Tuesday:** 09:00 - 17:00
- **Wednesday:** 09:00 - 17:00
- **Thursday:** 09:00 - 17:00
- **Friday:** 09:00 - 17:00
- **Saturday:** Closed
- **Sunday:** Closed

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
### Q: Where are you located?
A: Shop No. 9, Novo Shopping Plaza, Karu, Abuja, Nigeria.

### Q: Is delivery available?  
A: Yes, serving customers in Karu, Jikwoyi, Nyanya, Orozo, Asokoro.. Buyer covers rider fees.

### Q: Are products authentic? 
A: Absolutely. All items are sourced from authorized distributors.
